# hipfire speed-gate baseline — gfx942 (CDNA3, AMD Instinct MI300X)
# Captured 2026-04-28 on feat/cdna-calib-mfma after wave64 residual gemv lever
# Hardware: 1× AMD Instinct MI300X VF (192 GiB HBM3, 5.3 TB/s peak)
# ROCm 7.2.0 / kernel 6.8.0-106-generic / 28-core EPYC host
# Generated by: HIPFIRE_BASELINE_ARCH=gfx942 HIPFIRE_MODELS_DIR=... \
#               ./scripts/speed-gate.sh --update-baselines
# Captured against commit 2df3e29 + feat/cdna-calib-mfma deltas through 4af2ed2.
# Config: KV=asym3, HIPFIRE_GRAPH=1 for 4B/9B/27B (0.8B has known hipGraph bug)
# Tolerance: 0.05 (fail if any metric drops below baseline × (1 - tolerance))
#
# Measurements: best-of-2 via bench_qwen35_mq4. Two prefill sizes per model:
#   pp32  — short-context / launch-overhead regression detector
#   pp128 — realistic prompt / GEMM-efficiency detector
# Decode numbers are taken from the pp32 run (warmup+50 gen is enough to settle).
# GROUND FLOOR — no commit may regress below these numbers.
#
# Wave64 status: all hot HFQ4 kernels (qkv, qkvza, gate_up, residual)
# are wave64-native on this baseline. The 2026-04-28 wave64 residual gemv
# port (commit on this branch) closed the residual gap that the original
# 4105035 wave64 commit didn't cover; per-call kernel time -12% on rocprof.
# Net decode wall change is within within-session noise (residual gemv was
# already near HBM3 BW saturation). Cross-arch invariant: lever gates on
# `has_wave64_native(arch)` so RDNA paths are byte-exact unchanged.
#
# Note on HIPFIRE_GRAPH=1: hipGraph capture hurts MI300X 27B decode by
# ~4-5% (measured 2026-04-28: 66.0 → 63.0 tok/s with HIPFIRE_GRAPH=1).
# It's enabled here for 4B/9B because the speed-gate's run_bench helper
# hardcodes it for non-0.8B sizes (matching gfx1100 default). Future
# work: per-arch override of the gate's HIPFIRE_GRAPH default for CDNA.

0.8b_mq4_pp32_prefill_tok_s=775.9
0.8b_mq4_gen_tok_s=457.6
0.8b_mq4_pp128_prefill_tok_s=2847.8

4b_mq4_pp32_prefill_tok_s=451.2
4b_mq4_gen_tok_s=204.1
4b_mq4_pp128_prefill_tok_s=1652.6

9b_mq4_pp32_prefill_tok_s=352.5
9b_mq4_gen_tok_s=164.0
9b_mq4_pp128_prefill_tok_s=1305.0
